subject: Update ONAP SDK to support uploading of neighbor information to AAI
commit_message:
Update ONAP SDK to support uploading of neighbor information to AAI

Added py311 to tox

Issue-ID: INT-2205
Signed-off-by: pawel.denst <pawel.denst@external.t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: If6d90a46d8cd71dde757df860cef2ebe082c02a2
